hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; git -C /Users/hyerin/hyerin_project add "$f" 2>/dev/null && git -C /Users/hyerin/hyerin_project diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git -C /Users/hyerin/hyerin_project commit -m "auto: update $(basename \"$f\")" && git -C /Users/hyerin/hyerin_project push frontend-origin main 2>/dev/null || true
